metadata.description: Comprehensive diagram generation skills including charts, architecture diagrams, Mermaid diagrams, and logic diagrams

plugins.name: diagram-skills
plugins.description: Generate charts (bar, line, pie, scatter, radar, gauge), architecture diagrams, Mermaid diagrams (flowchart, sequence, class), and text-to-logic-diagram converters. Supports SVG/HTML output with dark/light themes.

skills.name: chart-craft
skills.description: Generate SVG/HTML charts from text descriptions - bar, line, pie, scatter, radar, and more

skills.name: chart-craft-plus
skills.description: Extended chart generation with 35+ chart types across 5 categories

skills.name: mermaid-generator
skills.description: Generate Mermaid diagrams - flowcharts, sequence diagrams, class diagrams

skills.name: architecture-diagram-zh
skills.description: Create architecture diagrams with SVG support for dark/light themes

skills.name: text-logic-diagram
skills.description: Convert text descriptions to logic diagrams with theme support

skills.name: algorithmic-art
skills.description: Generate algorithmic art and creative visuals
